title: Create SteelSkin
description: i made a power armor mod for create based of the protection pixel mod for newer versions of the create mod
body:
![title 2.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5722bf9392b100ca52e9b8e339c206e5ec2687ce.png)


This mod to add Power Armor in the newer versions of create and it is inspired by the Protection Pixel mod.

this mod needs create(i think you can remove it thought) for recipes and must! have curios API

**info**
There is the Train Power Armor Inpsired and built from sturdy and lighweight mateiriels and power by a train power core. This armor is wellrounded and not specific use.(after taking of helmet the effects of improved sight will works for a bit longer) .
(more armours planned in the future)

As well as the diving armors fast in fluids and have pretty good defensive stats, they have increased reach and increased oxygen capasity to stay under water/lava for longer at the trade off of on land speed. intoducing the copper and netherite power armors 


**gameplay**
' key defaults to drop down your armour(if you have it on)as a block lmb the block to don the armor.

(Train Power Armor)so make blaze donuts and have them in your inventory with a train compresser once you have the armour equiped you will have the effects working immediately.


(Copper/Netherite Power Armor) powered by their respective power cores which are perpetual so they don't use fuel but they break over time,**trims are bugged at the moment so don't use them, it dose not crash or anything but it looks bad :(**, don't forget to wear socks or you will stub your toes.

also if the power cores are not equiped in curios slots they will not power anything

im working on another fuel powered armor set that is optional so if you don't have some mods they won't be craftable in survival, the concept name of the next update(addon) is **Steel skin**.
But it won't be part of this mod instead it will be a sub addon so you won't need this mod for it to work

and in regards to the name this project may be changing to **Create BrassBones** its original name.

**the copper tweaks sub updated has released patching some errors and adding the Copper nailer**

after that is the **Alloyed update** 

![copper nailer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93092598db123e3e1c75a91ab602af907f3ea074.png)
